blockingIssues: FR text violates mandatory gender-neutral rule in several places by using gendered wording for the child, e.g. "{child_name} se sent enveloppé" on page_15.
NL locale contains several phrases that read like close translation rather than fully native premium Flemish copy, reducing translation naturalness and locale completeness.
EN and NL page_21 underplay the briefed beat of sharing the full adventure with parents; this weakens editorial arc fidelity and semantically diverges from FR/original brief.
FR page_18 omits the emotional farewell line about being braver, kinder, and more loved than imaginable, softening the premium emotional payoff requested in the brief.

Premium Belgian localization is slightly under-realized in some locale texts, especially EN/NL domestic scenes, which can be made more gift-worthy and culturally grounded without altering already-strong scene prompts.
